source: Plance di produzione (Tabelle_Materiali/World Order/Images/Player Production/). Abilita' speciali e bonus Focus dal regolamento (Rules.pdf). Produzione primaria letta dalle plance; alcuni valori a basso contrasto (Russia, produzione secondaria, denaro iniziale, valori esatti Prosperita') sono da verificare e marcati 'verify'.

focus_bonuses.note: Comuni a tutte le potenze. La voce 'ongoing' e' l'abilita' continuativa del round.

domestic.ongoing: Gain 2 Research more during the Research step.

military.ongoing: +1 THREAT wherever you have Armies, and +1 Defense in each Region in your zone of interest.

prosperity_track.note: Comune a tutte le potenze. Spendi Consumer Goods per avanzare di 1 spazio/round e guadagna VP + monete. Valori esatti da riverificare; confermati dall'estremita': costo 5 CG -> 9 VP + 30 money; costo 6 CG -> 12 VP.

special_abilities.name: Member of NATO
special_abilities.text: Ignore THREAT from the EU (and EU ignores THREAT from USA).

special_abilities.name: Global Superpower Status
special_abilities.text: In each Scoring step, count the Regions in which USA has the most Influence or is tied for most. If that number is less than 4, USA receives a penalty: 0->-12, 1->-8, 2->-5, 3->-2 VP.

special_abilities.name: Member of NATO
special_abilities.text: Ignore THREAT from the USA (and USA ignores THREAT from EU).

special_abilities.name: Secured Sphere of Influence
special_abilities.text: In each Scoring step, for each Region in Russia's zone of interest where Russia has the most Armies or is tied for most (having at least 1 Army), gain 2 VP.

special_abilities.name: Global FDI Network
special_abilities.text: At the end of the game, count the Regions in which China has at least 1 FDI token, and gain VP: 3->2, 4->3, 5->4, 6->6, 7->8 VP.
